project: MindSight: Generative AI-Powered Student Mental Health Detection and Insights
authors: Bhagyajyoti G, Bhavana P K, Bhoomika P B, Chandana S
pipeline_status: ML PIPELINE COMPLETE — App integration in progress

text.dataset: dair-ai/emotion + GoEmotions (54,263 samples, mapped to 7 unified classes)

behavioral.dataset: ScreenTime vs MentalWellness + Digital Behavior + Mobile Usage (400+ samples)

fusion.output: 7 unified emotion states: calm, stressed, anxious, sad, angry, happy, surprised

ai_report.status: Logic complete in notebook — deployment pending

next_steps: Flask backend API — wrap fusion + report into REST endpoints
React frontend — chat UI with webcam and mic input
Real webcam and mic integration for live multimodal input
